name: Fluorescent Lamp
descs: Turn End: If there are enemies or Abnormality parts with [Burst], apply 1 [AttackDmgUp] or 1 [Agility] to a random ally next turn. Repeat (# of enemies(or # of Abnormality Parts) with [Burst] + 1) times.

Turn End: If there are enemies or Abnormality parts with [Burst], apply 1 [AttackDmgUp] or 1 [Agility] to a random ally next turn. Repeat <style="upgradeHighlight">(# of enemies(or # of Abnormality Parts) with [Burst] + 3)</style> times.

Turn End: If there are enemies or Abnormality parts with [Burst], apply <style="upgradeHighlight">1 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Agility]</style> to a random ally next turn. Repeat (# of enemies(or # of Abnormality Parts) with [Burst] + 3) times.
